mapper.select: /* RntlMgmtMapper.getMspRntlBaseInfo */ SELECT A.ORGN_ID AS orgnId ,A.STRT_YM AS strtYm ,A.END_YM AS endYm ,A.PRDT_ID AS prdtId ,A.DEPLRICT_COST AS deplrictCost ,A.BUY_AMNT AS buyAmnt ,A.RENTAL_COST AS rentalCost ,A.VIRFY_COST AS virfyCost ,A.GRNT_AMNT AS grntAmnt FROM MSP_RNTL_BASE_INFO A WHERE #{baseDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} BETWEEN A.STRT_YM AND A.END_YM AND A.PRDT_ID = #{prdtId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.ORGN_ID = #{orgnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

/* RntlMgmtMapper.getMspRntlBaseInfo */ SELECT A.ORGN_ID AS orgnId ,A.CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum ,A.PRDT_ID AS prdtId ,A.RTRN_YM AS rtrnYm ,A.RTRN_DT AS rtrnDt ,A.RTRN_PROC_ID AS rtrnProcId ,A.RTRN_PROC_YN AS rtrnProcYn FROM MSP_RNTL_RTRN_INFO A WHERE A.ORGN_ID = #{orgnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.PRDT_ID = #{prdtId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
